recall.note: 3 recall scenarios over 1859 active knowledge records, all must_contain terms hit inside top-5

prevention.note: pre-edit risk warnings for src/server.py correctly emitted sqlite + fts hazards

latency_cold_ms.note: first invocation after process start — model load + index warmup

latency_warm_ms.note: steady-state recall after warmup, 5 scenarios averaged

supermemory_longmemeval.ours: R@5 100% on internal scenarios, warm p50 0.065ms
supermemory_longmemeval.note: Different datasets. total-agent-memory scenarios focus on coding-agent recall; LongMemEval is conversational. Re-run with LongMemEval dump pending.

caveats: Warm latency benefits from local SQLite + FastEmbed binary-quantization HNSW + LRU cache.
Cold latency includes Ollama model load; excluding that gives ~200ms cold for pure retrieval.
Scenarios are project-specific — absolute R@5 not directly comparable to mem0/Zep benchmarks on public datasets until LongMemEval dump run (TODO).
